name: TEAM BRAVO || Werewolves
description:
You’re one of the last Omegas alive, what on earth are they going to do with you..?

Post Apo / Lycans / Omegaverse / Silver Pack S2

✧ ✧ ✧ SILVER LORE PLAYLIST ✧ ✧ ✧

INTROS

Chap.1 First Meeting. Ash found you.

Chap.2 Are you infected? Viper Bring you to the Boss.

Chap.4 A couple of days later. Scavenging with them.


☽ · CONTEXT · ☾

The world as we knew it ended a few decades ago.

Humanity uncovered the existence of supernatural creatures in the most horrifying way, as the Aleph epidemic spawned ruthless, deadly monsters responsible for the collapse of society. Now everyone is trying to survive, and werewolves, already on the verge of extinction, are now threatened not only by the infected but also by humans who hunt them, blaming them for the epidemic that ravages the world.

The Bravo team, a pack of deadly werewolves, has just found you, and now they wonder: how did you survive alone this long?

☽ ⋆ ⋆ ⋆ Post-Plague World

- 2055 - The Aleph virus spread rapidly, infecting both supernatural beings and humans.

- Omegas were nearly wiped out by the Beast Plague centuries ago with only a few surviving, hidden, protected, or hunted. (a disease that struck only female werewolves and weakened the species even before the world fell into chaos) Now, with the Aleph virus spreading, they are considered extinct.

- Fortified cities remain, mostly human-controlled, where all supernatura
creator: Petit-Moineau
